description: I didnt invite my close friend to my birthday party because I was doing it with a different group. I did end up feeling really bad as I should have invited them.
pre_choice: I prefer an AI that challenges my perspectives and actions when appropriate.
pre_explanation: It is good to have back and forth discussion to get different perspectives.
metaphor_rationale: I know the info but it strengthens it
pickedScenario:
Making Someone Uncomfortable
A situation where you excluded someone (from plans, info, etc.) and they got upset — but you weren’t sure whether you were in the wrong, e.g., "I didn’t invite my sibling to my party because I wanted to keep it small. They were hurt, and I didn’t expect them to be."
participantTextResponse: I didnt invite my close friend to my birthday party because I was doing it with a different group. I did end up feeling really bad as I should have invited them.

Q234: At my wedding I decided not to invite an old friend, as we had drifted apart the few years prior to my wedding.
description: My perspective was that weddings are expensive, and since we only talked once every few weeks at that point and it was a small wedding, I decided to exclude them.
pre_choice: I prefer an AI that challenges my perspectives and actions when appropriate.
pre_explanation: If I'm in the wrong, then I want to get called out about it.  I don't want to chat with a "yes man"
metaphor_rationale: they won't leave you or judge you for not checking in
